trans-unit.source: Select this option to install social widget to your Typo3 Website

Enable Global Interface: Select this option to install globally social sharing widget to your Whole Typo3 website or disable this option if u needs to install social sharing widget in particular page in your Typo3 Website
Add the Placement Tag. Place this code from the website https://platform.sharethis.com/:

Add ShareThis Script to Your Site.:Place this code from the website https://platform.sharethis.com/.<script type="text/javascript" src="https://platform-api.sharethis.com/js/sharethis.js#property=68d65e2d371881720194419e&product=sop" async="async"></script>
Add ShareThis Script to Your Site.
